title: Assistant Store Manager - Big Bazaar - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Big Bazaar - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Big Bazaar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Big Bazaar:
Big Bazaar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Big Bazaar!
